_correction.reason: Owner clarified Spaarke uses sprk_event (with sprk_eventtype_ref discriminator) for general events. Original repo file used OOB appointment activity entity incorrectly. Corrected per CLAUDE.md § '2026-06-25 — Spaarke entity architecture'.
_correction.alsoAdded: Membership-scope branch via LookupUserMembership (ActionType 52) preserved — deployed PB-019 currently LACKS this; R4 PR 3 W1 + AC-5b deploys the corrected union. Event-type filter narrowed to 5 GUIDs {Action, Deadline, Meeting, Milestone, Reminder} per deployed canonical state.

playbook.name: New Events on Matters/Projects
playbook.description: Notifies users when new sprk_event records (of types Action, Deadline, Meeting, Milestone, Reminder) have been created on their assigned matters or projects since the last check. Uses Spaarke custom sprk_event entity (NOT OOB appointment activity).

timeWindow.label: Time window
timeWindow.description: How far back to look for new or updated events

configJson.description: Scoped to the current user's assigned matters and projects

Resolve the executing user's matter memberships (owner + assigned attorney + assigned paralegal) per ADR-034. Resolved IDs are bound to `myMatters.ids` for downstream filtering via {{joinIds myMatters.ids}}.

configJson.fetchXml: <fetch top="50"><entity name="sprk_event"><attribute name="sprk_eventname"/><attribute name="sprk_duedate"/><attribute name="sprk_finalduedate"/><attribute name="sprk_meetingdate"/><attribute name="sprk_plannedstart"/><attribute name="sprk_plannedend"/><attribute name="createdon"/><attribute name="sprk_eventid"/><attribute name="sprk_eventtype_ref"/><attribute name="statuscode"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingrecordname"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingrecordurl"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingmatter"/><attribute name="ownerid"/><link-entity name="sprk_matter" from="sprk_matterid" to="sprk_regardingmatter" link-type="outer" alias="m"><attribute name="sprk_mattername"/><attribute name="sprk_matternumber"/><attribute name="ownerid"/></link-entity><filter type="and"><condition attribute="createdon" operator="last-x-hours" value="{{timeWindowHours}}"/><condition attribute="createdby" operator="ne-userid"/><condition attribute="sprk_eventtype_ref" operator="in"><value>5a1c56c3-98ff-f011-8406-7c1e525abd8b</value><value>e0043c4b-99ff-f011-8406-7c1e525abd8b</value><value>8fb9b5a7-99ff-f011-8406-7c1e525abd8b</value><value>b86d712b-99ff-f011-8406-7c1e525abd8b</value><value>da6bc005-99ff-f011-8406-7c1e525abd8b</value></condition><filter type="or"><condition attribute="sprk_regardingmatter" operator="in" value="{{joinIds myMatters.ids}}"/><condition entityname="m" attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid"/><condition attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid"/></filter></filter><order attribute="createdon" descending="true"/></entity></fetch>
configJson.description: New sprk_event records (eventtype IN {Action, Deadline, Meeting, Milestone, Reminder}, createdby != current user, createdon in last {{timeWindowHours}}, default 24h) where EITHER (a) sprk_regardingmatter is in the user's myMatters.ids membership set [LookupUserMembership branch], OR (b) the event owner is the current user, OR (c) the sprk_regardingmatter owner is the current user.
Check if any new events were found

configJson.title: You have {{newEvents.output.count}} new event(s) on your matters
